query:
SELECT 'orders_total' as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM orders
UNION ALL
SELECT 'orders_completed', COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status='completed'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'orders_pending', COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status='pending'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'email_leads', COUNT(*) FROM email_leads
UNION ALL
SELECT 'quiz_results', COUNT(*) FROM quiz_results
UNION ALL
SELECT 'rage_clicks_home', COUNT(DISTINCT sessionId) FROM behavior_events WHERE event='rage_click' AND page='home'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'exit_intent_home', COUNT(DISTINCT sessionId) FROM behavior_events WHERE event='exit_intent' AND page='home'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'scroll_50pct', COUNT(DISTINCT sessionId) FROM behavior_events WHERE event='scroll_depth' AND value LIKE '%50%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'scroll_75pct', COUNT(DISTINCT sessionId) FROM behavior_events WHERE event='scroll_depth' AND value LIKE '%75%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'scroll_100pct', COUNT(DISTINCT sessionId) FROM behavior_events WHERE event='scroll_depth' AND value LIKE '%100%';
